# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---

      app: order-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

  namespace: default

    matchLabels:
      app: analytics-service
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: redis-cache
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis-cache
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-ingress-access
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-controller
          namespace: ingress-nginx
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-from-frontend
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: default
        - name: frontend
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-from-order
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-authorized
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-authorized
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: default
        - name: user-service
          namespace: default
---

  namespace: default

    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
        - name: user-service

        - name: payment-service
          namespace: default

  name: database-proxy-authorized
  namespace: default

  server:
    name: database-proxy
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: default
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: default
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: default

  name: redis-cache-authorized
  namespace: default

  server:
    name: redis-cache

    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: default

          namespace: default
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-api-http
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: admin-api
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-api-restricted
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-api-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: admin-portal
          namespace: admin
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-server
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: prometheus
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: metrics-from-all-services
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: default
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: webhook-receiver
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webhook-receiver
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: webhook-receiver-external
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: webhook-receiver
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: internal-messaging
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: message-queue
  port: 5672
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: messaging-internal-only
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: internal-messaging
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: default
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: default
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: default
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: default
